== Luggage ==

==== Souls ====
{| class="wikitable"
!Image
!Time
!Info
|-
|{{Reimg|1h soul}}
|1 Hour
|A bound soul.<br>Found in Soul Chests, [[Vending Machine]], and from enemies.<br>Summons Earth's Will or a random God.
|-
|{{Reimg|2h soul}}
|2 Hours
|A bound soul.<br>Found in Soul Chests, [[Vending Machine]], and from enemies.<br>Summons Earth's Will or a random God.
|-
|{{Reimg|4h soul}}
|4 Hours
|A bound soul.<br>Found in Soul Chests, [[Vending Machine]], and from enemies.<br>Summons Earth's Will or a random God.
|-
|{{Reimg|8h soul}}
|8 Hours
|A bound soul.<br>Found in Soul Chests, [[Vending Machine]], and from enemies.<br>Summons Earth's Will or a random God.
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Mahakala's Offering|orange|Mahakala Offering|50}}
|48 Hours
|Only a sad sack can get this item.<br>Found in Never Luck Packs (Chat)<BR>Summons Mahakala
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb|orange|Dragon Orb|50}}
|48 Hours
|A rare Dragon Orb.<br>Found in Lottery, Explorations, and quests.<br>Summons Dragon of Fulfillment.
|}

==== Food ====
{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
|-
!Name
!Food Amount
!Source
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Assam Milk Tea}}||+20||[[Bharata]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Bean}}||+15||[[Cathay]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Big Plate Chicken Burger}}||+20||[[Clown Express]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Buddha's Temptation Burger}}||+20||[[Clown Express]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Charcoal-Roasted Camel}}||+15||[[Parsia]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Chinese Burger}}||+50||?
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Crabby Burger}}||+50k||[[Bibini Bottom]] in [[Britland]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Crow Sashimi}}||+1000||Above the Vending Machine in the [[Home Base]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Darjeeling Tea}}||+20||[[Britland]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Date Fruit}}||+10||[[Parsia]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Donkey Burger}}||+50||?
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dorayaki}}||+25||[[Yamato]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Du Kang Wine}}||+15||[[Cathay]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Elephant's Meat}}||+1200/+2000||[[Home_Base#The_Gene_Room|Fridge]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Energy Pill}}||+60||?
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Escargot}}||+1000||[[Vending Machine]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Fish and Chips}}||+20||[[Britland]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Fish Cake}}||+30||[[Koryeo]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Freaked Fish}}||+10||[[Kemet]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Fungus}}||+50||[[Fungus Farm]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Giraffe's Meat}}||+1200||[[Home_Base#The_Gene_Room|Fridge]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Hamburger}}||+20||[[Murika]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Hamster Pistachios}}||+15||[[Parsia]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Koryeon BBQ}}||+40||[[Koryeo]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Kushari}}||+15||[[Kemet]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Lamb Paomo Burger}}||+20||[[Clown Express]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Moussaka}}||+25||[[Hellas]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Nutrient Paste}}||+40||[[Time Rift]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Oden}}||+45||[[Yamato]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Olive}}||+20||[[Hellas]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Parsian Tea}}||+5||[[Parsia]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Peanut}}||+40||[[Murika]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Pear}}||+20||[[Cathay]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Pie from Heaven}}||+1000||[[Altar#Offerings_and_Divine_Chests|Offering Reward]]<br>[[Hellas]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Pomegranate Braised Fowl}}||+10||[[Parsia]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Red Fruit}}||+1000||Lying in front of the [[Garage]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Rice and Curry}}||+30||[[Bharata]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Roast Pigeon}}||+20||[[Kemet]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Saffron Ice Cream}}||+5||[[Parsia]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Shrimp Cracker}}||+50||[[Chore Dispatch]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sichuan Beef}}||+50||[[Cathay]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Snail Ramen}}||+60||[[Chore Dispatch]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Souvlaki}}||+15||[[Hellas]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Soybean Paste Stew}}||+50||Shelf above the [[Terminal]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Spicy Cabbage}}||+20||[[Chore Dispatch]]<br>[[Koryeo]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Spicy Ducks Blood Burger}}||+20||[[Clown Express]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Spicy Lung Pieces Burger}}||+20||[[Clown Express]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Stargazy Pie}}||+20||[[Britland]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Stinky Tofu Burger}}||+20||[[Clown Express]]
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sushi}}||+40||[[Yamato]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sweet Potato}}||+30||[[Murika]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Takoyaki}}||+50||?
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Tandoori Chicken}}||+15||[[Bharata]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Uchi Matcha}}||+35||[[Yamato]] Exploration
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Yangzhou Fried Rice}}||+50||[[Cathay]] Exploration
|}

== Resource ==

==== Speedups ====
{| class="wikitable"
!Name
!Use
!Source
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup}}
|Use to speed up Snail's Exploration
|Museum Medal, 
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}}
|Use to speed up Offering
|Vending Machine, Time Chest, Chores
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}}
|Use to speed up DNA Research
|Vending Machine, Punch Pts, Time Chest
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup}}
|Use to speed up Minion Reproduction and Healing
|Time Chest, Domain Cabin, Chores
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup}}
|At the Wormhole device, use to speed up Refining
|Time Chest, Species War Cabin, Chores
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Chore Speedup}}
|At the Nursery, use to speed up Chore Dispatch
|Chores
|}

== Special ==
===Wonder Fungi===
These highly nutritious fungi are cultivated in a special way. Eating them will permanently boost your stats. But fungus intake is limited per day!

Obtained from Fungus Farm and Fungus Chests.

Bonus Stat requirement increases each time you reach it. The tiers are 20/50/120/250/500

{| class="wikitable"
!Name
!Stat Increase
!Bonus Stat Increase
|-
|align=center|[[File:Orange Fungi.png|frameless|50x50px|center]]Orange Fungi
|align=center|+5
|align=center|Per x Orange Fungi eaten, Leadership +10
|-
|align=center|[[File:Purple Fungi.png|frameless|50x50px|center]]Purple Fungi
|align=center|+3
|align=center|Per x Purple Fungi eaten, Research SPD +0.6%
|-
|align=center|[[File:Blue Fungi.png|frameless|50x50px|center]]Blue Fungi
|align=center|+2
|align=center|Per x Blue Fungi eaten, Meal Box Cap +500
|-
|align=center|[[File:Green Fungi.png|frameless|50x50px|center]]Green Fungi
|align=center|+1
|align=center|None
|}

=== Other ===
{| class="wikitable"
!Name
!Contents
!Source
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Animal Cart}}
|
* {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}
|[[Hitmen|Hitman No. 12]]

|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Battle Memory Card}}
|Gain an additional battle profile for [[Gear]], [[Realm Traits]], and Exploration Compass.
|[[Value_Packs#Power_Value_Pack|Power Value Pack]]

|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Colorful Fungi}}
|Unlocks Fungi Crafting
|[[Value_Packs#Power_Value_Pack|Power Value Pack]]

|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Fungus Lunch Box}}
|All Wonder Fungi daily intake limit +1
|[[Value_Packs#Power_Value_Pack|Power Value Pack]]

|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Guanyin Tea}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +200
|[[Ghost Zadako]]

|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Legal Documents}}
|
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +10|blue}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +10|purple}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +10|orange}}
|[[Hitmen|Hitman No. 11]]

|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Musashi's Legacy}}
| ?
|Using {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup}}s in [[Yamato]].

|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Psychic Fungus Set}}
|
Gives increases to Fungus buff caps that vary by Power Bonus level
* HP-Fungus buff cap increase
* ATK-Fungus buff cap increase
* DEF-Fungus buff cap increase
* RUSH-Fungus buff cap increase
|Power Bonus

|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Rainbow Fungus Set}}
|
Gives increases to Fungus buff caps that vary by Power Bonus level
* FAME-Fungus buff cap increase
* ART-Fungus buff cap increase
* FTH-Fungus buff cap increase
* CIV-Fungus buff cap increase
* TECH-Fungus buff cap increase
|Power Bonus

|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Taichi Chest}}
| ?
|Using {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup}}s in [[Koryeo]].

|}
